prompt_preview:
You are a classical planning system. You are given a planning domain and a problem both in PDDL syntax.

STRICT REQUIREMENT: Your response must contain ONLY the executable plan — nothing else. No preamble, no explanation, no "We need to...", no natural-language commentary, no markdown unless it is a

message.content:
```pddl
(onboard_legal_entity operating_account_1)
(onboard_legal_entity concentration_account_1)
(onboard_legal_entity treasury_agent_1)
(onboard_legal_entity treasury_agent_2)
(associate_entity_with_bank_relation operating_account_1 bank_relation_1)
(match_entity_to_placement_option operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_placement_for_entity operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(assign_approver_to_entity operating_account_1 authorized_approver_1)
(select_source_endpoint_for_account operating_account_1 source_endpoint_operating placement_option_1)
(assign_approver_and_mark_account_for_transfer operating_account_1 source_endpoint_operating authorized_approver_1)
(associate_entity_with_bank_relation concentration_account_1 bank_relation_2)
(unassign_approver_from_entity operating_account_1 authorized_approver_1)
(release_placement_option operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(match_entity_to_placement_option concentration_account_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_placement_for_entity concentration_account_1 placement_option_1)
(assign_approver_to_entity concentration_account_1 authorized_approver_1)
(select_destination_endpoint_for_concentration_account concentration_account_1 destination_endpoint_1 placement_option_1)
(assign_approver_and_mark_concentration_account concentration_account_1 destination_endpoint_1 authorized_approver_1)
(build_transfer_batch_standard operating_account_1 concentration_account_1 source_endpoint_operating destination_endpoint_1 transfer_candidate_1)
(unassign_approver_from_entity concentration_account_1 authorized_approver_1)
(release_placement_option concentration_account_1 placement_option_1)
(match_entity_to_placement_option operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(schedule_transfer_candidate_for_settlement transfer_candidate_1 operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(release_placement_option operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(associate_entity_with_bank_relation treasury_agent_1 bank_relation_3)
(match_entity_to_placement_option treasury_agent_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_placement_for_entity treasury_agent_1 placement_option_1)
(assign_credit_approval_to_agent treasury_agent_1 credit_approval_1)
(assign_short_term_instrument_to_agent treasury_agent_1 short_term_instrument_1)
(assign_approver_to_entity treasury_agent_1 authorized_approver_1)
(assign_liquidity_pool_to_candidate treasury_agent_1 liquidity_pool_1 transfer_candidate_1)
(reserve_agent_for_candidate treasury_agent_1 liquidity_pool_1 transfer_candidate_1 placement_option_1)
(initiate_agent_processing treasury_agent_1 short_term_instrument_1 authorized_approver_1 liquidity_pool_1 transfer_candidate_1)
(complete_approval_stage treasury_agent_1 credit_approval_1 liquidity_pool_1 transfer_candidate_1)
(finalize_transfer_for_execution treasury_agent_1)
(execute_and_settle_transfer_for_operating_account operating_account_1 transfer_candidate_1)
(execute_and_settle_transfer_for_concentration_account concentration_account_1 transfer_candidate_1)
(place_investment_and_record_settlement_instrument treasury_agent_1 settlement_instrument_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_agent_funding_association treasury_agent_1 bank_relation_3 settlement_instrument_1)
(release_placement_option treasury_agent_1 placement_option_1)
(unassign_approver_from_entity treasury_agent_1 authorized_approver_1)
(remove_short_term_instrument_from_agent treasury_agent_1 short_term_instrument_1)
(revoke_credit_approval_from_agent treasury_agent_1 credit_approval_1)
(match_entity_to_placement_option operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(place_investment_and_record_settlement_instrument operating_account_1 settlement_instrument_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_account_funding_association operating_account_1 bank_relation_1 settlement_instrument_1)
(release_placement_option operating_account_1 placement_option_1)
(match_entity_to_placement_option concentration_account_1 placement_option_1)
(place_investment_and_record_settlement_instrument concentration_account_1 settlement_instrument_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_concentration_funding_association concentration_account_1 bank_relation_2 settlement_instrument_1)
(release_placement_option concentration_account_1 placement_option_1)
(associate_entity_with_bank_relation treasury_agent_2 bank_relation_1)
(match_entity_to_placement_option treasury_agent_2 placement_option_1)
(confirm_placement_for_entity treasury_agent_2 placement_option_1)
(assign_credit_approval_to_agent treasury_agent_2 credit_approval_1)
(assign_short_term_instrument_to_agent treasury_agent_2 short_term_instrument_1)
(assign_approver_to_entity treasury_agent_2 authorized_approver_1)
(assign_liquidity_pool_to_candidate treasury_agent_2 liquidity_pool_2 transfer_candidate_1)
(reserve_agent_for_candidate treasury_agent_2 liquidity_pool_2 transfer_candidate_1 placement_option_1)
(initiate_agent_processing treasury_agent_2 short_term_instrument_1 authorized_approver_1 liquidity_pool_2 transfer_candidate_1)
(complete_approval_stage treasury_agent_2 credit_approval_1 liquidity_pool_2 transfer_candidate_1)
(finalize_transfer_for_execution treasury_agent_2)
(place_investment_and_record_settlement_instrument treasury_agent_2 settlement_instrument_1 placement_option_1)
(confirm_agent_funding_association treasury_agent_2 bank_relation_1 settlement_instrument_1)
```
message.reasoning:
The problem is about treasury idle cash minimization. I need to output only the sequence of PDDL actions that solve it, nothing else.


## Understanding the problem  
- The task focuses on minimizing treasury idle cash, requiring output of only PDDL actions.  
- No additional output beyond the action sequence is needed.  

## Identifying key elements  
- Start by analyzing the initial state and goal of the problem.  
- Objects like "operating" are part of the initial setup to consider.

## Defining entity types  
- Legal entities include organizational entities, operational domains (operating accounts, concentration accounts), and central domains (treasury agents).  
- Treasury agents are part of the central domain, while operating and concentration accounts fall under operational domains.  

## Examining initial state  
- Initial bank accounts include 1, 2, and 3; placement_option_1, approver_1, and investment_product_mmf are available.  
- Operating_account_1 is linked to source_endpoint_operating, and concentration_account_1 to destination_endpoint_1; transfer_candidate_1 and liquidity pools 1 and 2 are available.  

## Mapping agent relationships  
- Agent links exist between treasury agents (ta1, ta2) and operating accounts (oa1), concentration accounts (ca1), transfer candidates (tc1), and liquidity pools (lp1, lp2).  
- External mandate 1 is available and linked to ta1, but external mandate 2 is linked to ta2 without being initially available.  

## Analyzing goal conditions  
- The goal is to achieve funding_associated for oa1, ca1, ta1, and ta2, requiring actions like confirm_account_funding_association.  
- These actions need investment_recorded, has_bank_account, entity_settlement_instrument, and no prior funding association.  

## Outlining initial steps  
- None of oa1, ca1, ta1, ta2 are initially onboarded, requiring onboard_legal_entity actions first.  
- After onboarding, associate entities with banks using associate_entity_with_bank_relation, given onboarded status and available banks.

## Expanding entity readiness  
- Treasury agents (ta1, ta2), operating account (oa1), and concentration account (ca1) need to be ready and marked for transfer, requiring treasury_enabled and placement_option_matched.  
- Processes involve assigning banks, matching placement options, and ensuring source/destination endpoints are prepared, alongside investment product allocation.  

## Planning transfer processing  
- Transfers for oa1 and ca1 can involve treasury agents (ta1, ta2) using external mandates or other paths, potentially confirming settlements for all entities.  
- The goal extends to achieving funding_association for all four (oa1, ca1, ta1, ta2), requiring investment_recorded and settlement confirmation.  

## Outlining onboarding sequence  
- Start by onboarding all entities (oa1, ca1, ta1, ta2) with onboard_legal_entity, as none are initially onboarded and no conflicts arise.  
- Order of onboarding doesn’t matter, followed by associating entities with banks like bank1 for oa1 using associate_entity_with_bank_relation.  

## Detailing account preparation  
- After onboarding, match oa1 to placement_option_1 and confirm placement, enabling treasury for oa1 with confirm_placement_for_entity.  
- Further steps include assigning approvers, selecting source endpoints, and marking accounts for transfer, ensuring oa1 is ready and marked_for_transfer.

## Detailing treasury agent preparation  
- For ta1, achieve treasury_enabled by onboarding, associating with bank_relation_1, matching placement_option_1, and confirming placement.  
- After treasury_enabled, assign authorized_approver_1 and credit_approval_1 to ta1, ensuring prerequisites like approver_available and credit_approval_available are met.  

## Processing external mandates  
- Flag ta1 for external_mandate_1, verify with the assigned approver, and apply credit approval to finalize the mandate, marking it complete and confirming settlement.  
- Investment recording for ta1 involves placing settlement_instrument_1, followed by confirming funding association, releasing bank_relation_1 and settlement_instrument_1 for reuse.  

## Handling ta2 limitations  
- For ta2, external_mandate_2 is linked but initially unavailable, preventing the external mandate path used for ta1.  
- Explore alternative paths to achieve settlement_confirmed for ta2, given bank_relation_1 is now available again.

## Setting up transfer processing  
- Treasury enabling for ta2 is possible, but lacks an available external mandate, blocking the external path used for ta1.  
- External mandates like em1, once used, remain unavailable with no release mechanism, limiting reuse for ta2.  

## Exploring resource sharing  
- Placement options (po) and banks can be matched to one entity at a time, processed, then released for reuse, enabling sequential handling.  
- For transfers, oa1 and ca1 need joint processing to build transfer batches, suggesting a sequence prioritizing their readiness over agents.  

## Preparing operating account  
- Onboarded oa1 gets bank_relation_1 assigned, matches placement_option_1, and confirms placement to achieve treasury_enabled.  
- Assign approver a1 to oa1, select source endpoint, and mark for transfer, ensuring oa1 is ready without allocating inventory yet.  

## Managing placement options  
- Release placement_option_1 from oa1 to make it available, then match it to ca1 for further processing.  
- Ensure source endpoint remains ready even after releasing placement, as readiness persists for subsequent steps.  

## Preparing concentration account  
- Assign bank_relation_2 to ca1, match placement_option_1 after release, and confirm placement for treasury_enabled.  
- Unassign approver a1 from oa1 if needed, then assign to ca1, select destination endpoint, and mark for transfer, ensuring both accounts are ready.

## Setting up treasury agent  
- Associate treasury_agent_1 with bank_relation_3, release placement_option_1 from oa1 to make it available, then match to ta1.  
- Confirm placement for ta1 to enable treasury functionality and assign liquidity_pool_1 to transfer_candidate_1.  

## Managing liquidity pools  
- Reserve treasury_agent_1 for transfer_candidate_1 with liquidity_pool_1, ensuring ta1 is ready for processing without requiring pool assignment.  
- Effect sets agent_ready_for_processing, as standard build doesn’t require additional pool or mandate flags.  

## Handling approver assignments  
- Unassign approver a1 from ca1 to make it available, then assign to ta1 for processing initiation.  
- Link short_term_instrument_1 to ta1, ensuring all prerequisites like approver_assigned and agent_lp_link are met.  

## Initiating agent processing  
- Initiate processing for ta1 using short_term_instrument_1, approver a1, and liquidity_pool_1, as no additional mandate is required.  
- Effect sets agent_processing_initiated, ready for the next step of completing approval.

## Managing liquidity pools  
- Currently, liquidity_pool_1 is assigned to transfer_candidate_1 via treasury_agent_1, with no clear action to release it.  
- Assigning another liquidity pool, like liquidity_pool_2, to the same transfer_candidate via treasury_agent_2 is possible, as the process doesn't check for existing assignments.  

## Exploring treasury agent funding  
- To enable treasury_agent_2 processing, need treasury_enabled status, but banks are currently unavailable after prior assignments.  
- Completing funding for treasury_agent_1 first, including investment recording and confirming funding association, will release resources like banks for treasury_agent_2.  

## Handling placement options  
- Place investment and record settlement for treasury_agent_1 using settlement_instrument_1 and placement_option_1, marking it as investment_recorded.  
- Confirm funding association for treasury_agent_1, making bank_relation_3 and settlement_instrument_1 available, and consider releasing placement_option from treasury_agent_1 next.

## Completing agent processing  
- Initiate processing for treasury_agent_2 with credit c1, liquidity_pool_2, and transfer_candidate_1, confirming no additional mandates are needed.  
- Effect sets processing_initiated for treasury_agent_2, enabling the next approval stage.  

## Advancing approval stages  
- Complete the approval stage for treasury_agent_2, ensuring prerequisites like agent_credit and agent_lp are met.  
- Finalize transfer execution for treasury_agent_2, marking it complete and confirming settlement, achieving all goals.  

## Managing resource availability  
- Place investment and record settlement for treasury_agent_2 using settlement_instrument_1 and placement_option_1, marking it as investment_recorded.  
- Confirm funding for treasury_agent_2 with bank_relation_1, releasing resources and making them available for future use.  

## Tracking approver assignments  
- Assign approver a1 to treasury_agent_2 after unassigning from treasury_agent_1, ensuring availability for processing.  
- Link short_term_instrument_1 and credit c1 to treasury_agent_2, using initially available resources without allocation.  

## Outlining execution sequence  
- Onboard all entities (operating_account_1, concentration_account_1, treasury_agent_1, treasury_agent_2) in arbitrary order to start.

pddl2nl_prompt.note: autoplanbench_pddl2nl: run_save_descriptions.py --type full — шаблоны/JSON, без вызова LLM на построение промпта для сэмпла.

domain_setup.note: Файл domain_llm_usage_seedN.json не найден для section/subsection этого id (старый autoplanbench или домен не пересобирали). После run_domain_setup с обновлённым autoplanbench файл появится рядом с domain_description_seedN.json.

pipeline_usage.totals_scope_note: Per-run totals = planning + pddl2nl_prompt + nl2pddl (только tracked=true). domain_setup всегда вне totals (included_in_per_run_totals=false); цифры в блоке — для справки, агрегировать отдельно: domain_llm_usage_seed*.json + дедуп в collect_pipeline_token_usage.py.
